title: Health Economics & Outcomes Research
description: The HEOR module provides tools for health economics and outcomes research, including cost-effectiveness analysis, budget impact modeling, care gap identification, and population health analytics integrated with OMOP CDM data.
tips: Define cost models based on procedure, drug, and visit costs from your CDM data.
Care gap analysis identifies patients who are missing recommended screenings or treatments.
Population analytics provides demographic breakdowns and outcome distributions across cohorts.
HEOR analyses can be scoped to specific data sources and cohort definitions.
Export results for publication-ready tables and figures.
